The phenomenon where a student recognizes a small set of underlying facts through repeated exposure to differently worded questions is called _____.

Exposure saturation

What limitation exists when using TF-IDF cosine similarity for question deduplication?

It measures surface wording similarity rather than underlying tested concepts.
